It involves no dynamic execution, no data handling, and no external interactions.\n\n---\n\n### Confirmed Findings:\n- **Presence of issues:** No, all reports correctly identify that the code is benign and standard.\n- **Malicious activity:** None detected; all reports assign malware scores of 0.\n- **Obfuscation:** None; code is clear and straightforward.\n- **Security risks:** None; the code is purely an export statement with a source map comment.\n\n---\n\n### Critical Evaluation of Each Report:\n\n**1-5.
